HediffDef.label: Cultivation method: Tortoise meditation
HediffDef.description: A cultivation technique designed to enhance qi absorption efficiency. It requires practitioners to sleep longer while also slowing their metabolism.

HediffDef.label: Cultivation method: Mountain eating
HediffDef.description: A cultivation technique designed to enhance qi absorption efficiency. This method makes people feel hungry much more quickly.

HediffDef.label: Cultivation method: Mystic
HediffDef.description: A cultivation technique designed to enhance qi absorption efficiency. However, it causes the practitioner to experience physical pain.

HediffDef.label: Cultivation method: Refinement handwork
HediffDef.description: A cultivation technique designed to enhance qi absorption efficiency. It provides a modest boost to the practitioner's work efficiency.

HediffDef.label: Cultivation method: Air step
HediffDef.description: A cultivation technique designed to enhance qi absorption efficiency. This method slightly increases movement speed.
